roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant - Sheriff Affidavit Warrant Received- SAW ISSUED 10-31-19-SERVED 07-10-22
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
Sheriff Affidavit Warrant Return SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT, NON COMP

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/SAORD/NTW60/LDPX:11-12-19/987,2/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ONTHE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/SA3:THE TENDERLOIN AREA BOUNDED BY GEARY, 4TH, AND HOWARD STREETS AND GRANT AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO CALIF/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DA DISMISSES THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1387(C)-CASE TO PROCEED BY FEDERAL INDICTMENT/
